calendar.matters:
Petition To Terminate The Irrevocable Subtrust Know As The Bypass Trust
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Anson T. Cain appearing by CourtCall for Rose G. Bucklin.

The Court stated before it today is Petition to Terminate the Irrevocable Subtrust Known as the Bypass Trust which is based on the argument that the tax law has changed. Mr. Cain argued that the biggest issue is due to a "changed circumstance", that the decendent died in 2017, that the exemption jumped and that was the whole reason that they needed a bypass trust, and that the bypass trust is no longer needed. The Court stated that the bypass trust also specified beneficiaries. Brief argument by Mr. Cain is held. Mr. Cain also argued that pursuant to Probate Code 15407(a)(2) that the Court has the authority to terminate the trust when the purpose of the trust has been fulfilled and that the Court also has authority pursuant to Probate Code 15409(a). At the conclusion of Mr. Cain's argument, the Court took the Petition to Terminate the Irrevocable Subtrust Known as the Bypass Trust under submission. The Court noted that a proposed order is in the file.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Matter not reported.

Petition To Terminate The Irrevocable Subtrust Know As The Bypass Trust
Off Calendar Jul-03-2019 Continued To Aug-14-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
